title: Financial support for nuclear lifetime extensions
body: "This consultation seeks views on amending the Contract for Difference (CfD) legislation to enable existing nuclear generating assets to be eligible for CfDs to incentivise investment into lifetime extensions of operating nuclear plants, subject to all value for money considerations and relevant approvals.  We welcome views from statutory consultees, which includes:   the devolved governments electricity suppliers Ofgem the National Energy System Operator (NESO)   We also welcome responses from anyone with an interest in the policy areas.  "
